allow: Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content app/game/EnemyView.tsx\) -replace 'width=\\"12\\" height=\\"12\\"', 'width=\\"15\\" height=\\"15\\"' | Set-Content app/game/EnemyView.tsx")
